zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：低位震荡偏强修复
zh.content:
当前艾达币对美元维持低位震荡偏强结构，价格站稳0.144上方后缓慢抬升，但上方0.149附近抛压明显，短线仍处反弹修复阶段，整体趋势尚未形成强势突破，多空博弈加剧

均线20位于0.14486附近构成动态支撑，MACD处于正值区域但动能有限，快慢线信号未完全确认，RSI指标缺失但结合价格结构显示多头动能温和释放，趋势偏震荡上

下方支撑位于0.1476附近，若跌破可能回测0.144均线区域，上方阻力集中在0.1492与前高0.1493区间，突破需放量确认，否则仍以区间震荡为主

操作建议短线以区间高抛低吸为主，接近0.147可轻仓试多，靠近0.149压力逐步减仓，若放量突破则顺势跟进，否则严格控制仓位与止损

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ADA/USD is currently exhibiting a mild consolidation phase after a modest intraday gain, holding above its 20-period simple moving average at 0.14486. Price action remains tightly compressed between 0.1476 and 0.1492, suggesting equilibrium between buyers and sellers. The broader short-term structure leans slightly bullish as price continues to stabilize above recent support zones without significant retracement pressure, indicating controlled accumulation rather than distribution.

Momentum indicators present a cautiously constructive outlook. The MACD reading of 0.0009137 indicates a weak but positive momentum bias, though the absence of a confirmed signal line limits full validation of trend strength. Without RSI data, overbought or oversold conditions cannot be directly assessed. Even so, price behavior near session highs suggests steady demand, with buyers maintaining pressure without entering an overextended phase or showing signs of exhaustion.

Immediate support is established at 0.1476, aligning with the recent session low, followed by stronger structural support at the 20-SMA around 0.14486. A decisive breakdown below this level could expose downside risk toward 0.142. On the upside, resistance is located at 0.1492, with a psychological barrier at 0.150, and a more extended resistance zone near 0.155 if bullish momentum strengthens further.

Trading conditions currently favor short-term range strategies rather than breakout positioning due to compressed volatility. Buying near support zones with disciplined risk control below 0.1448 may offer favorable risk-reward opportunities. Profit-taking into resistance around 0.1492–0.150 is prudent, while traders should remain alert, as extended periods of tight consolidation often precede sharp directional expansion.
